Interface ICadDrawingLayers

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesFile
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesFile.dll

Provides access to properties that give information on the layers in the CAD drawing.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E37F71AA-BFB1-11D2-9B20-00C04FA33299")]
public interface ICadDrawingLayers

Properties

DrawingLayerCount

The number of layers in the CAD drawing.

int DrawingLayerCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

DrawingLayerName[int]

The name of the CAD drawing layer at the specified index.

string DrawingLayerName[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DrawingLayerVisible[int]

Indicates if the specified CAD drawing layer visible in the CAD layer in ArcMap.

bool DrawingLayerVisible[int Index] { get; set; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

OriginalDrawingLayerVisible[int]

Indicates if the specified CAD drawing layer visible in the CAD drawing itself.

bool OriginalDrawingLayerVisible[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Property Value

bool
